title: Playwright Automation — Staff Seeding & Deletion Flow (UI-Based)
description:
Description
This ticket covers the Playwright automation script for seeding and resetting the staff data in the InstaSub application via the UI. The script logs in as the protected admin, deletes all non-protected staff members through the UI delete flow, and re-creates them using the
Add Staff
 button with stored data. This script is intended as a
one-time or on-demand seed script
 to reset the environment to a known state before running test suites.
🔐 Protected Account (Must NEVER be deleted)
Field
Value Name
admin userx Email
adminuserxadminzx@mailinator.com
 /
adminzx@maillinator.com Role
District Admin Location
regscus
👥 Staff to be Deleted & Re-created (6 users)
#
Name
Email
Phone
Location
Role
Type
Certified 1
regs admin
regsadmin@mailinator.com
+144516515651365
regscus
District Admin
Teacher
Yes 2
school admin
schooladmin@mailinator.com
+16516532123
SchoolAcademyTest2345
School Admin
Teacher
Yes 3
user third
thirdezce@mailinator.com
+1564332151322215
regscus
Employee
Teacher
Yes 4
user one
schoolruser670@mailinator.com
+119199899
SchoolAcademyTest2345
Employee
Teacher
Yes 5
user automation
staffuser210@mailinator.com
+1415611515311353
SchoolAcademyTest2345
Employee
Teacher
Yes 6
user two
schoolteacher890@mailinator.com
+1456645345456
SchoolAcademyTest2345
Employee
Teacher
Yes
🧪 Test Cases
TC-SEED-01 — Login as Protected Admin
Preconditions:
 App is running at
<https://instasublogin.tcpsoftware.com
>

Steps:
Navigate to the login page
Enter email:
adminuserxadminzx@mailinator.com
Enter the admin password
Click Login / Submit
Verify redirect to Dashboard/Home (
/home
)
Expected Result:
 Admin is logged in and redirected to the home dashboard without errors.
TC-SEED-02 — Navigate to Staff Management Page
Preconditions:
 Logged in as admin

Steps:
Navigate to
/manage/employees
Verify the staff table loads with all existing staff rows
Verify the protected admin (
adminzx@maillinator.com
) is visible in the list
Expected Result:
 Staff management page loads, showing all staff members including the protected admin row.
TC-SEED-03 — Delete All Non-Protected Staff (UI Flow)
Preconditions:
 On
/manage/employees
, at least 1 non-protected staff member exists

Steps:
For each staff row in the table:

a. Check if the email matches
adminzx@maillinator.com
 — if yes,
skip

b. If not protected, click the
Delete
 icon/button on that row

c. Wait for the confirmation dialog to appear

d. Click
Confirm / Yes
 in the dialog

e. Wait for success toast / row removal
Repeat until all non-protected staff are deleted
Verify only the protected admin row remains
Expected Result:
 All 6 non-protected staff members are deleted. Protected admin row is untouched and still visible.
Critical Constraint:
 Under no circumstances should the script delete
adminzx@maillinator.com
.
TC-SEED-04 — Protected Admin is Never Deleted
Preconditions:
 Script is executing the deletion loop

Steps:
Script evaluates each row's email against the protected list
When the protected admin email is found, the delete action is
skipped entirely
After full deletion loop completes, confirm protected admin still appears in staff table
Expected Result:
 Protected admin account remains intact throughout and after the full deletion loop. No delete action is triggered for this account.
TC-SEED-05 — Re-create Staff via Add Staff Button (Per User)
Preconditions:
 Non-protected staff have been deleted; on
/manage/employees

Steps (repeat for each of the 6 staff members):
Click the
Add Staff
 button on the staff management page
In the Add Staff modal/form, fill in:
First Name
 and
Last Name
Email
Phone
Location / School
 (select from dropdown)
Role
 (District Admin / School Admin / Employee)
Type
 (Teacher)
Certified
 (Yes)
Submit / Save the form
Verify success toast appears
Verify the new staff member row appears in the staff table
Expected Result:
 Each of the 6 staff members is successfully re-created with all correct field values. Success toast confirms creation. Staff table reflects updated count.
TC-SEED-06 — Verify Full Staff State After Seeding
Preconditions:
 All 6 staff have been re-created

Steps:
Reload
/manage/employees
Count total staff rows — expect
7
For each expected staff member, verify:
Name
Email
Role
Location
Confirm protected admin is present and unchanged
Expected Result:
 Staff table shows exactly 7 members with all correct data matching the seed dataset. No duplicate or missing entries.
TC-SEED-07 — Idempotency — Re-run Script on Already-Seeded State
Preconditions:
 Script has already been run once; all 7 staff exist

Steps:
Run the seed script again
Script detects existing non-protected users and deletes them
Script re-creates all 6 staff again
Verify final state is 7 staff (1 protected + 6 re-created)
Expected Result:
 Script is idempotent — running it multiple times always results in the same clean 7-user state without errors or duplicates.
⚙️ Automation Details
Field
Value Framework
Playwright (Node.js) Script file
seed-staff.js Run command
node seed-staff.js Script type
One-time / on-demand seed script Login method
UI (email + password) Delete method
UI delete button + confirmation dialog Create method
UI Add Staff button + form fill Environment
<https://instasublogin.tcpsoftware.com
>
✅ Acceptance Criteria
[ ] Script logs in successfully as the protected admin
[ ] All 6 non-protected staff are deleted via UI delete flow
[ ] Protected admin (
adminzx@maillinator.com
) is never deleted under any circumstances
[ ] All 6 staff are re-created via Add Staff UI button with correct field data
[ ] Final staff table shows exactly 7 members matching the seed dataset
[ ] Script can be re-run multiple times (idempotent)
[ ] No hardcoded passwords —
LOGIN_PASSWORD
 is passed via environment variable
🔗 Related
Playwright seeding script:
seed-staff.js
Application URL:
<https://instasublogin.tcpsoftware.com/manage/employees
>
This ticket is structured to serve as both a QA test plan and a
prompt for code generation
 — each test case maps directly to a function or step in the Playwright script. Let me know if you'd like to adjust any test cases, add edge cases (e.g. network failure handling, missing fields), or split this into sub-tasks!

[ ] Script can be re-run multiple times (idempotent)
[ ] No hardcoded passwords — LOGIN_PASSWORD is passed via environment variable
testableItems: TC-SEED-01 — Login as Protected Admin: Preconditions: App is running at <https://instasublogin.tcpsoftware.com > Steps: Navigate to the login page Enter email: adminuserxadminzx@mailinator.com Enter the admin password Click Login / Submit Verify redirect to Dashboard/Home ( /home ) Expected Result: Admin is logged in and redirected to the home dashboard without errors.

TC-SEED-02 — Navigate to Staff Management Page: Preconditions: Logged in as admin Steps: Navigate to /manage/employees Verify the staff table loads with all existing staff rows Verify the protected admin ( adminzx@maillinator.com ) is visible in the list Expected Result: Staff management page loads, showing all staff members including the protected admin row.

TC-SEED-03 — Delete All Non-Protected Staff (UI Flow): Preconditions: On /manage/employees , at least 1 non-protected staff member exists Steps: For each staff row in the table: a. Check if the email matches adminzx@maillinator.com — if yes, skip b. If not protected, click the Delete icon/button on that row c. Wait for the confirmation dialog to appear d. Click Confirm / Yes in the dialog e. Wait for success toast / row removal Repeat until all non-protected staff are deleted Verify only the protected admin row remains Expected Result: All 6 non-protected staff members are deleted. Protected admin row is untouched and still visible. Critical Constraint: Under no circumstances should the script delete adminzx@maillinator.com .

TC-SEED-04 — Protected Admin is Never Deleted: Preconditions: Script is executing the deletion loop Steps: Script evaluates each row's email against the protected list When the protected admin email is found, the delete action is skipped entirely After full deletion loop completes, confirm protected admin still appears in staff table Expected Result: Protected admin account remains intact throughout and after the full deletion loop. No delete action is triggered for this account.

TC-SEED-05 — Re-create Staff via Add Staff Button (Per User): Preconditions: Non-protected staff have been deleted; on /manage/employees Steps (repeat for each of the 6 staff members): Click the Add Staff button on the staff management page In the Add Staff modal/form, fill in: First Name and Last Name Email Phone Location / School (select from dropdown) Role (District Admin / School Admin / Employee) Type (Teacher) Certified (Yes) Submit / Save the form Verify success toast appears Verify the new staff member row appears in the staff table Expected Result: Each of the 6 staff members is successfully re-created with all correct field values. Success toast confirms creation. Staff table reflects updated count.

TC-SEED-06 — Verify Full Staff State After Seeding: Preconditions: All 6 staff have been re-created Steps: Reload /manage/employees Count total staff rows — expect 7 For each expected staff member, verify: Name Email Role Location Confirm protected admin is present and unchanged Expected Result: Staff table shows exactly 7 members with all correct data matching the seed dataset. No duplicate or missing entries.

TC-SEED-07 — Idempotency — Re-run Script on Already-Seeded State: Preconditions: Script has already been run once; all 7 staff exist Steps: Run the seed script again Script detects existing non-protected users and deletes them Script re-creates all 6 staff again Verify final state is 7 staff (1 protected + 6 re-created) Expected Result: Script is idempotent — running it multiple times always results in the same clean 7-user state without errors or duplicates.
